code:
import io
import string
import list

fn main() -> Unit
  let line = io.read_line()
  match line
  when Some(s)
    let tokens = string.split_whitespace(s)
    mut found = false
    mut best = 0
    mut i = 0
    while i < tokens.len()
      match tokens.get(i)
      when Some(tok)
        match string.parse_int(tok)
        when Some(n)
          if n > 0
            if not found
              best = n
              found = true
            else if n > best
              best = n
            end
          end
        when None
        end
      when None
      end
      i = i + 1
    end
    if found
      println("max=#{best}")
    else
      println("none")
    end
  when None
    println("none")
  end
end
